mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goal_stars (user_id, goal_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{goalId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, goal_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM goal_stars WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goal_id = #{goalId}
mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.user_id, g.title, g.description, g.target_date, g.status, g.metadata::text AS metadata, g.share_code, g.is_public, g.public_slug, g.ai_prompt, g.theme_id, g.preferences::text AS preferences, g.created_at, g.updated_at FROM goals g JOIN goal_stars s ON s.goal_id = g.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
